name: Ideal Partner
description:
We all know them, surveys.

Rewarding or not, they can have an interesting effect on certain statistics in the world...

 ‍


Hello everyone! 👋🏻

Welcome to another bot, this time I made an MTF or FTM transformation bot (your choice) by answering a survey from the internet. This survey, depending on the mode you choose, changes your form & personality. For each question it’ll try to give possible answers, if it doesn’t, you can simply ask too. !NEW! Added a cloning option that introduces a completely new person having the attributes you set.

 ‍

There are three modes: Instant mode, Advanced mode and !NEW! Projectory mode.

In Instant mode, changes occur right after answering each question.

In Adaptive mode, the transformation starts after the survey has been completed.

!NEW! In Projectory mode, the transformation on yourself is cancelled & applied to a completely new person instead.

 ‍

(You can cancel the transformation on yourself by saying !killswitch.)

It should work fine with Janitor, but as always, DeepSeek is recommend.

Art: Self-generated AI
CW: Gender Bending, Body & Psychological Transformation, Identity Crisis, Intimacy
creator: pinkstilettos
